privileged_info_summary: Verified that all configuration parameters required by the task exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the task prompt. Furthermore, the requested satellite NORAD IDs (25338, 28654, 33591, 37849, 37214) were cross-referenced via web search and confirmed to be the real, correct NORAD IDs for the NOAA 15, 18, 19, SUOMI NPP, and FENGYUN 3B satellites, respectively. The task uses slightly synthetic geographic coordinates (e.g., placing the Ewa Beach PTWC roughly 5 miles away in Kapolei), but strictly scores the agent on entering the exact synthetic values requested.
